text:
i have the same result on 10.2-release 10.3-release and 11-current

on this machine i am running 

FreeBSD AndersLap 11.0-ALPHA3 FreeBSD 11.0-ALPHA3 #0 r301929: Wed Jun 15 22:15:55 CEST 2016     anders@AndersLap:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64


and the LibreCad package is from the FreeBSD repo latest.
